free_text: Relative and absolute neutron-induced fission cross
Dr. thesis presented at to Uppsala Univ. un 2001.
Additional data at 45 MeV in table
About half of the neutrons have the quoted energy,
with a spread of less than 2 MeV FWHM, and the rest
of the neutrons form a tail extending from the
maximum energy down to zero, with a virtually flat
Total time resolution of about 4-5 nsec, flight
path of about 12 m. TOF measurements were not done
Description of the thin-film breakdown counters
- linear momentum transfer from neutron to fissioning
- subtraction of fissions by low-energy neutrons by
decomposition of TOF spectra (except for 135 MeV
where interpolation was done from the measurements
